entries.summary: Al Jazeera compiled timeline of Biden administration's stated positions on Gaza war.
Biden's debate performance against Trump triggered Democratic concerns about his candidacy.
Biden withdrew from the 2024 presidential race citing party unity considerations.
Biden's announcement letter endorsed Vice President Kamala Harris as Democratic nominee.
Republicans demanded Biden resign immediately after his withdrawal from race.
World leaders publicly reacted to Biden's withdrawal from the presidential race.
Harris hailed Biden's legacy in her first speech since he quit.
Biden delivered an Oval Office address explaining his withdrawal decision.
Al Jazeera analyzed key takeaways from Biden's Oval Office withdrawal address.
Harris named Minnesota Governor Tim Walz as her running mate.
Coverage asked whether Biden on the trail would help or hurt Harris.
Harris gave a major policy speech promising to bring down household costs.
Democratic National Convention opened in Chicago with party leaders rallying behind Harris.
Harris formally accepted the Democratic Party's presidential nomination at the DNC.
Biden joined Harris at her first joint campaign stop since withdrawal.
Harris and Trump met for their sole presidential debate in Philadelphia.
Trump labelled Harris a disaster as he concluded his final day campaigning.
Biden's halting debate performance against Trump triggered Democratic panic about candidacy.
CNN tracked mounting Democratic calls for Biden to step aside from race.
Biden announced his withdrawal from the 2024 presidential race.
CNN's inside look detailed Biden's three-day decision-making process to exit.
Biden's statement endorsed Harris as the Democratic Party's presidential nominee.
CNN summarized Biden's exit, Harris's ascent, and Trump's reaction.
CNN tracked the diverse coalition of donors quickly backing Harris's campaign.
Harris held large Atlanta rally with growing Democratic enthusiasm and turnout.
Harris selected Minnesota Governor Tim Walz as her vice presidential running mate.
Democratic National Convention opened in Chicago with Biden's farewell convention address.
Harris formally accepted the Democratic presidential nomination on the DNC's final night.
CNN tracked Harris and Trump activities as the race began tightening.
Harris and Trump met in their sole presidential debate in Philadelphia.
CNN tracked candidate activities six weeks before Election Day.
CNN covered the final stretch of the Harris-Trump presidential contest.
Election Day brought Trump's victory over Harris across all battleground states.
